A Display That Defies Logic. 19.8" Virtual Workspace.

When both 14-inch OLED panels are expanded flat, experience an expansive 19.8-inch display area. Perfect for complex multi-tasking, panoramic visual editing, or reviewing huge data sets without scrolling.

Aesthetic Durability

Ceraluminum™.
Harder than ever.

Inspired by the aerospace industry, our proprietary Ceraluminum material undergoes an eco-friendly plasma ceramicization process. This significantly increases wear resistance and thermal management while delivering a unique natural tactile finish.

  • Eco-friendly Process

    Uses pure water without organic VOCs.

1. Weight may vary according to configuration. Actual performance may vary depending on settings, environmental conditions, and usage.

2. Battery tests conducted by ASUS. Actual battery life may be significantly less depending on product configuration, software, usage conditions, power management settings and time.
